title_cn: 内部活跃：摩根士丹利的罗杰斯谈持续增长
summary: Growth investing has faced no shortage of challenges over the past decade, from shifting interest-rate regimes and benchmark concentration, to the rise of AI and unprecedented flows into passive strategies. In this episode of Inside Active, host David Cohne, mutual fund and active management analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, speaks with Doug Rogers, managing director at Morgan Stanley and portfolio manager on funds including the Eaton Vance Growth Fund (ELCIX) and Eaton Vance Focused Growth Opp

title: Vanguards of Healthcare: Bristol Myers Maps Oncology’s Next Act
title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：百时美施贵宝规划肿瘤学的下一步
summary: “Neuroscience is what oncology was 20 years ago,” says Cristian Massacesi, Chief Medical Officer and Head of Development at Bristol Myers Squibb. Massacesi joins Bloomberg Intelligence pharmaceuticals analyst Sam Fazeli to discuss Bristol Myers’ push into neuroscience, including Alzheimer’s therapies aimed at tau, a protein tied to brain tangles in the disease. They also explore the company’s oncology pipeline, including PD-L1/VEGF bispecifics, next-generation antibody-drug conjugates and advanc

title: Talking Transports: Autumn Transport’s Focus on Bulk Freight
title_cn: 谈论运输：秋季运输聚焦散装货运
summary: Many trucking companies have endured a prolonged freight downturn, but specialized bulk carriers are experiencing a different cycle. In this episode of the Talking Transports podcast, Autumn Transport CEO Julie Andrich joins Bloomberg Intelligence senior transportation and logistics analyst Lee Klaskow to discuss how the company’s focus on food, feed, agricultural and industrial bulk freight has insulated it from much of the volatility affecting traditional truckload markets. Andrich explains ho

title: Oil Falls to Three-Month Low as US-Iran Deal Set to Add Supply
title_cn: 美伊协议将增加供应，油价跌至三个月低点
summary: Oil headed for its longest run of declines this year as the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz boosted expectations for a revival in supply, with leading Wall Street banks reducing their price forecasts and key market gauges tumbling.

title: Stanford's Wallace Says US Recession Is Not a Certainty
title_cn: 斯坦福大学华莱士表示美国经济衰退并非必然
summary: Stanford Management Company CEO Rob Wallace discusses his views on the US economy, and the challenges of managing a $50 billion portfolio for Stanford University's endowment. He joins David Rubenstein on this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth. The interview was recorded April 9 in Palo Alto, CA.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Binance Prepares for EU Exit With Local License in Limbo
title_cn: 币安为欧盟退出做准备，当地许可证悬而未决
summary: Binance Holdings Ltd. is preparing to stop providing its services in the European Union, as a deadline to receive a license to operate in the bloc draws near and the crypto exchange has yet to receive approval from Greece’s financial regulator.

title: S&P 500 Slips as Semiconductor Stocks Take a Breather; SpaceX Extends Gains
title_cn: 半导体股稍作喘息，标普 500 指数下跌； SpaceX 扩大涨幅
summary: US stocks fell Tuesday, led lower by declines for technology companies after recent big gains.

title: JPMorgan Markets Debt for Long Lake’s $6.3 Billion Amex GBT Deal
title_cn: 摩根大通为 Long Lake 63 亿美元的 Amex GBT 交易推销债务
summary: JP Morgan Chase & Co. has begun marketing a debt package to help fund Long Lake Management Inc’s. $6.3 billion acquisition of Global Business Travel Group Inc., the travel platform spun out of American Express Co., adding to a recent pickup in leveraged-buyout financings coming to market.

title: SpaceX Set to Overtake Amazon in Value as It Soars for Third Day
title_cn: SpaceX 市值连续第三天飙升，将超越亚马逊
summary: SpaceX jumped for a third straight day on Tuesday, putting it on track to overtake Amazon.com Inc. in value and briefly making it the world’s fourth largest stock ahead of Microsoft Corp.

title: A Billion Dollars of Leveraged SpaceX Bets Hit ETFs in One Day
title_cn: 10 亿美元的 SpaceX 杠杆押注一天之内就击中了 ETF
summary: Leveraged bets on SpaceX generated more than $1 billion of trading volume on their first day, as investors rushed to amplify wagers on the biggest IPO in history, underscoring the extraordinary retail appetite surrounding Elon Musk’s newest public company.

title: S&P 500 Rally Falters Before Fed as SpaceX Surges: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着 SpaceX 飙升，标准普尔 500 指数在美联储之前的涨势开始动摇：市场结束
summary: A rally that sent stocks to the brink of all-time highs faltered on the eve of the first Federal Reserve rate decision under Kevin Warsh, with a another slide in oil prices driving bond yields lower.

title: World Cup Exposes Growing Global Prediction Market Rift
title_cn: 世界杯暴露了全球预测市场日益扩大的裂痕
summary: This year’s World Cup is the first since prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket exploded to popularity as a new way to bet on sports.

title: Debt Chiefs Tout Benefits of Hedge Fund Growth in Bond Markets
title_cn: 债务巨头吹捧债券市场对冲基金增长的好处
summary: Some sovereign debt chiefs are warming up to the growing footprint of hedge funds in government bond markets, casting these investors as potentially beneficial participants rather than a source of risk.

title: Wall Street Stares Down Crypto-Style Trading All Day, Every Day
title_cn: 华尔街每天都在关注加密货币风格的交易
summary: Traditional finance firms are starting to embrace round-the-clock trading for a range of assets in a way that has disrupted schedules in crypto for years.

title: Brightline Bondholders Grant Two-Week Extension on Debt Payment
title_cn: Brightline 债券持有人同意债务偿还期限延长两周
summary: Brightline Trains Florida LLC, the struggling $6 billion private railroad between Miami and Orlando, struck a deal with holders of $985 million of municipal bonds to extend a debt payment due Monday through the end of the month, according to a securities filing.

title: Wells Fargo Boosts S&P 500 Year-End Target as US-Iran Deal Nears
title_cn: 随着美伊协议临近，富国银行上调标准普尔 500 指数年终目标
summary: A combination of easing macroeconomic worries, improving sentiment and interest-rate hike expectations that are priced in will enable US stocks to move higher, according to Wells Fargo Securities LLC.

title: Nvidia’s New Bonds Are Trading Actively After $25 Billion Sale
title_cn: Nvidia 新债券发售 250 亿美元后交易活跃
summary: Initial trading volume has been strong for Nvidia Corp.’s new bonds, though prices have remained near where the $25 billion of debt was sold at.

title: France's Confavreux on Iran Deal, Hormuz, Tech, Digital Tax
title_cn: 法国 Confavreux 讨论伊朗协议、霍尔木兹海峡、科技、数字税
summary: French Foreign Ministry spokesman Pascal Confavreux speaks with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the G7 gathering in Evian, France. He discusses the deal with Iran, including the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, as well as tolls concerns and incentives. He also addresses technology, AI, and France's digital services tax. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Offers Conditional $500 Million Loan for Rare-Earths Plant
title_cn: 美国为稀土工厂提供 5 亿美元有条件贷款
summary: Mining startup Phoenix Tailings Inc. received a conditional commitment for $500 million in long-term debt financing from the Pentagon’s Office of Strategic Capital to help build a domestic rare-earth processing facility.

title: Biofuels Are Key to Preventing Sharp Drop in Farmland, S&P Says
title_cn: 标准普尔表示，生物燃料是防止农田急剧减少的关键
summary: Expanding biofuel demand is a “powerful catalyst” to restore profitability to American farms, according to a new study, as harvests balloon and lawmakers consider broadening the market for corn-based ethanol.

title: Essar Signs $500 Million IRH Deal to Buy Oil, Sell Stanlow Fuels
title_cn: Essar 签署 5 亿美元 IRH 购买石油、销售 Stanlow 燃料的协议
summary: Essar Group’s energy unit has tied up with International Resources Holding’s trading arm to source crude for its Stanlow refinery in the UK and market products in a deal worth $500 million.

title: Gold Advances as Trump Touts Reopening of Hormuz This Week
title_cn: 随着特朗普本周重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose after US President Donald Trump said the Strait of Hormuz could reopen on Friday, a development that would ease an energy and inflation shock that has roiled global markets.

title: SpaceX Options Trading Starts Strong as Traders Chase Musk Mania
title_cn: 随着交易员追逐马斯克狂热，SpaceX 期权交易开始强劲
summary: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. options were among the most heavily traded among US companies on Tuesday, helping to spur an early 17% gain in the rocket maker in its third day of trading.

title: Trump Says Iran Deal Includes 99.9% of What He Wants
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗协议包含了他想要的99.9%
summary: President Donald Trump says the peace deal with Iran includes "99.9% of what he wants." Speaking at the Group of Seven summit in France, Trump said the deal will prevent Iran from ever having a nuclear weapon. The deal is set to be signed on Friday in Switzerland. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vanderbilt University to Sell Up to $430 Million of Muni Bonds
title_cn: 范德比尔特大学将出售高达 4.3 亿美元的市政债券
summary: Vanderbilt University is planning to sell up to $430 million of tax-exempt bonds to pay for capital projects.

title: Ex-Tory Treasurer Merges Advisory Firm Fenchurch With Broadhaven Capital
title_cn: 前保守党财务主管将咨询公司 Fenchurch 与 Broadhaven Capital 合并
summary: Fenchurch Advisory Partners, the London-based advisory boutique focused on the financial services industry, has agreed to merge with Broadhaven Capital Partners to accelerate its expansion into the US market.

title: Yum to Sell Pizza Hut; Dave & Buster’s Sinks | Stock Movers
title_cn: 百胜出售必胜客；戴夫和巴斯特的水槽|库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Yum! Brands (YUM) agreed to sell its struggling Pizza Hut chain for $2.7 billion to a private equity firm and its China business. LongRange Capital will acquire Pizza Hut ex-China for $1.5 billion, Yum said in a statement Tuesday. Yum China Holdings Inc. will buy the rest of the business for $1.2 billion. The transactions are expected to close in the third quarter.

- Dave & Buster’s (PLAY) shares tumble after the operator of restaurant and entertainment facilities reported comparable sales for the first quarter that missed the average analyst estimate. Research firm Benchmark downgraded the stock, citing a lack of confidence that same-store sales will stabilize/eventually turn positive this year. 

- Robinhood Markets (HOOD) shares are up after it said it is reducing its full-time employee workforce by 10%, and also closing a small number of open roles. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yum! Will Sell Struggling Pizza Hut for $2.7 Billion
title_cn: 嗯！将以 27 亿美元出售陷入困境的必胜客
summary: Yum! Brands is selling the chain to private equity firm LongRange Capital. The deal is expected to close in the third quarter. Yum! will now focus more on its better-performing Taco Bell and KFC chains. Michael Halen of Bloomberg Intelligence is on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CSN Cement Sale Faces Questions as Holcim Resists Huaxin Bid
title_cn: Holcim 抵制华新收购，CSN 水泥销售面临问题
summary: Huaxin Cement Co.’s bid for the cement unit of Brazil’s Cia. Siderurgia Nacional is facing resistance from one of the Chinese company’s key shareholders, Holcim Ltd., according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Housing Starts Drop to the Weakest Pace Since 2020
title_cn: 美国新屋开工率跌至 2020 年以来最低水平
summary: New residential construction in the US slowed to the weakest pace in six years, driven by a steep decline in apartment projects.

title: ECB’s Lane Says Inflation Is in the Pipeline Despite Iran Deal
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长莱恩表示，尽管与伊朗达成协议，通胀仍在酝酿之中
summary: The European Central Bank must be prepared for inflation that’s been unleashed by the conflict in the Middle East but is yet to be felt, according to Chief Economist Philip Lane.

title: Race to Turn AI Compute Into a Commodity Spurs New Crypto Boom
title_cn: 将人工智能计算变成商品的竞赛刺激了新的加密货币热潮
summary: Ethan Vera thought Luxor Technology’s future was helping Bitcoin miners buy and sell mining hardware.

title: Apple Plans Camera AirPods Alongside Upgraded Foldable iPhone in 2027
title_cn: 苹果计划在 2027 年推出带摄像头的 AirPods 和升级版可折叠 iPhone
summary: Apple Inc.’s upcoming camera-equipped AirPods, a product meant to vault the company into the AI device market, is scheduled to launch in late 2027 as part of a flurry of new releases.

title: Ripple Buys Stake in Flutterwave Valuing It at $3.3 Billion
title_cn: Ripple 收购 Flutterwave 股份，估值达 33 亿美元
summary: Flutterwave Inc., one of Africa’s most valuable financial-technology startups, sold an equity stake to Ripple, as it seeks to accelerate growth through payments expansion and strategic partnerships.

title: AI Is Training Staff Very Quickly, Says RBC's McKay
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行 (RBC) 的麦凯表示，人工智能正在非常快地培训员工
summary: Royal Bank of Canada Chief Executive Officer Dave McKay says it's "unbelievable" how fast artificial intelligence is training staffers. He says the technology is also making workers more efficient. He spoke to Lisa Abramowicz on Tuesday at a Bloomberg Newsmakers event in Toronto.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Moody's: Private Credit Faces 2028 Test
title_cn: 穆迪：私人信贷面临 2028 年考验
summary: Marc Pinto, the Global Head of Private Credit at Moody's Ratings, joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why private credit is entering a pivotal phase. While AI infrastructure spending is creating huge lending opportunities, cracks are beginning to emerge in software-focused portfolios. Pinto warns that the real test comes in 2028, when a wave of refinancing could expose which borrowers survive and which don't. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Driving 'Insatiable Appetite' for Capital, RBC's McKay Says
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行的麦凯表示，人工智能正在推动资本“永不满足的胃口”
summary: Royal Bank of Canada CEO David McKay says there is a risk-on attitude in the market right now, driven by the push for AI and computing capacity. He speaks with Lisa Abramowicz at a Bloomberg Newsmakers event. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Principal Mineral Buys Cerberus-Backed Critical Materials Firm
title_cn: Primary Mineral 收购 Cerberus 支持的关键材料公司
summary: Principal Mineral is buying a Cerberus Capital Management LP-backed firm that produces components for printed circuit boards, a key electronic part used in products from cars to planes to AI servers.

title: SpaceX Pounces on $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Days After IPO
title_cn: IPO 几天后 SpaceX 发起 600 亿美元 Cursor 收购
summary: Technically, SpaceX had 30 days following its record-shattering public debut to decide on a $60 billion takeover of the AI coding startup Cursor. In the end, all it took was two trading days.

title: SpaceX Cements $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Following IPO
title_cn: 首次公开募股后，SpaceX 巩固了 600 亿美元的 Cursor 收购
summary: SpaceX formally agreed to take over Cursor in a deal that values the artificial intelligence coding startup at $60 billion, cementing a key part of Elon Musk’s efforts to catch up with rivals on coding tools.

title: The Executive Coach Showing Sam Altman How to Lead With ‘Emotional Fluidity’
title_cn: 执行教练向山姆·奥尔特曼展示如何通过“情绪流动性”进行领导
summary: Joe Hudson is sure the winners of the impending tech revolution will be human.

title: SpaceX Agrees to $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Post-IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 同意在首次公开募股后以 600 亿美元收购 Cursor
summary: SpaceX will take over Cursor in a deal that values the artificial intelligence coding startup at $60 billion, as Elon Musk aims to catch up with rivals on coding tools. The deal is expected to close in the third quarter. Ed Ludlow reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Poland Pursues Taiwan Investments to End Role as Assembly Hub
title_cn: 波兰寻求台湾投资以结束其作为装配中心的角色
summary: Poland is betting on a flood of investments and technology transfers from Taiwanese companies to reengineer its $1 trillion economy.

title: Microsoft’s Latest Surface PCs Offer Better Graphics, Faster AI
title_cn: 微软最新的 Surface PC 提供更好的图形、更快的人工智能
summary: Microsoft Corp. introduced updated Surface Pro and Surface Laptop devices, refreshing both products with faster graphics and new chips from Qualcomm Inc. to more effectively court creative professionals and artificial intelligence super users.

title: Startup Backed by Ex-Google CEO Debuts Industrial Robot With LG
title_cn: 由前谷歌首席执行官支持的初创公司与 LG 合作推出工业机器人
summary: A startup backed by former Google Chief Executive Officer Eric Schmidt unveiled an industrial robot powered by artificial intelligence, as investors pile into the emerging field of humanoids.

title: Siri AI Catching Up to Chatbot Competitors
title_cn: Siri AI 追赶聊天机器人竞争对手
summary: Apple’s new Siri AI, despite mainly delivering on promises made two years ago, is good enough to help ease Apple out of its AI crisis, says Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss the advancements of Siri AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Anthropic Crackdown Sets Off AI Alarms for US Allies
title_cn: 特朗普的人为镇压为美国盟友敲响人工智能警报
summary: With the recent crackdown on Anthropic, the Trump administration has given global leaders another reason to panic about their place in the technology race.

title: French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm
title_cn: 法国安全部门将用当地公司取代 Palantir
summary: France’s domestic intelligence agency, DGSI, will replace Palantir Technologies Inc. data tools with a local alternative made by Chapsvision, as European countries increasingly seek to reduce their dependence on US tech firms.

title: Man Group Sees ‘Bubble Risks’ as AI Bond Sales Break Records
title_cn: 英仕曼集团认为人工智能债券销售打破纪录，存在“泡沫风险”
summary: Man Group Plc says “bubble risks” are mounting as bond sales boom in the race to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Databricks Sales Double for Product That Competes With Snowflake
title_cn: Databricks 与 Snowflake 竞争的产品销售额翻倍
summary: Databricks Inc., a privately held software maker that competes with Snowflake Inc. and Alphabet Inc.’s Google, said its data warehousing business has more than doubled in size over the last year, reaching a $1.5 billion annual run rate.

title: Adani Ports Partners With Kaleris for AI Terminal Software
title_cn: Adani Ports 与 Kaleris 合作开发人工智能终端软件
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s port unit is teaming up with US-based Kaleris to deploy an AI-driven software to operate the company’s 15 container terminals across nine ports.

title: Dan Ives on US-Anthropic Talks, AI M&A, Open AI Losses
title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 谈美国-人类对话、人工智能并购、公开人工智能损失
summary: Dan Ives, global senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, discusses what he calls the “tug of war” between Anthropic and the Trump administration, why he expects accelerated M&A on artificial intelligence, and reported losses at OpenAI ahead of the company’s IPO later this year.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Regulator Weighs Cutting Data Center Power Use at Peak Times
title_cn: 英国监管机构考虑削减数据中心高峰时段的用电量
summary: The UK’s energy regulator is weighing whether future data centers should be required to reduce power consumption during periods of system stress, part of a broader effort to accommodate a surge in electricity demand from artificial intelligence and cloud computing.

title: Goldman Traders See Room for Rally to Broaden Beyond AI Winners

summary: The AI pioneer is working to allay White House concerns about national security

summary: Plaud Inc., a startup that makes artificial intelligence note-taking devices, said it’s planning to release a new wearable device later this year that can work with AI agents and that it expects to book $500 million in sales in 2026.

title_cn: Verizon 推出新计划和忠诚度计划以争夺客户

summary: Meta Platforms Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg set out three years ago to build a Twitter competitor with 1 billion users. He’s halfway there.

summary: Much of the information about how work actually gets done lives in employees’ heads, and capturing this knowledge is hard.

title: SpaceX Set for More Than 50% Jump in Just Three Sessions | The Pulse 6/16/2026

summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Elise Badoy, Citi Head of EMEA Research; Colin Hunt, AIB CEO;  Jeff Currie, Abaxx Markets Executive Co-Chairman (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Netanyahu Pays a Political Price for Trump’s Iran Deal

summary: Benjamin Netanyahu has spent years cultivating one of the most important relationships in global politics. Now, that relationship with Donald Trump may be becoming a liability, explains Dan Williams. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RBC CEO on AI, Jobs, SpaceX IPO, US Trade, Energy Demand

summary: Royal Bank of Canada Chief Executive Officer Dave McKay talks about SpaceX going public, how artificial intelligence is being used at the bank, the US trade war with Canada, how he views markets and the investment climate in Canada. He spoke to Lisa Abramowicz on Tuesday at a Bloomberg Newsmakers event in Toronto.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Prepare for Deal Signing With Both Claiming Victory
title_cn: 美国和伊朗准备签署协议，双方都声称取得了胜利
summary:
The US and Iran are preparing to formally sign their interim peace deal in Switzerland on Friday, with both sides claiming victory and oil traders and shippers unsure over how quickly the Strait of Hormuz will be reopened.

The text of the so-called memorandum of understanding — a 14-point document that should lead to a two-month ceasefire extension and the start of negotiations over Iran’s nuclear program — has yet to be published. A senior US official said it’s possible that happens in the next two days, ahead of the signing ceremony in Geneva. Vice President JD Vance is expected to head the American delegation, while Iran will likely be represented by Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf.

Josh Wingrove, Bloomberg News Senior Washington Correspondent, joins from Geneva with the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Farage Shakes Up Social Media Team to Face Threat From the Right
title_cn: 法拉奇重组社交媒体团队以应对来自右翼的威胁
summary: Nigel Farage privately vowed to overhaul the team that manages his Facebook account because they were under-performing Rupert Lowe, the leader of a rival right-wing party who boasts a huge following on social media.

title: China Calls for Greater International Role in Next Iran-US Talks

title: US, Iran Prepare for Deal Signing With Both Claiming Victory
title_cn: 美国和伊朗准备签署协议，双方都声称取得了胜利
summary: The US and Iran are preparing to formally sign their interim peace deal in Switzerland on Friday, with both sides claiming victory and oil traders and shippers unsure over how quickly the Strait of Hormuz will be reopened.

title: FBI Stopped Attack on UFC Event at White House, Patel Says
title_cn: 帕特尔表示，联邦调查局停止了对白宫 UFC 赛事的攻击
summary: FBI director Kash Patel said that the agency and law enforcement arrested “multiple individuals” planning an attack on the UFC America 250 Event at the White House on Sunday evening.

title: Can Trump Really Reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Friday?
title_cn: 特朗普真的能在周五之前重新开放霍尔木兹海峡吗？
summary: President Donald Trump says the Strait of Hormuz will be open by Friday when a peace deal with Iran is to be signed, but it's not clear how that will happen. Becca Wasser, defense lead for Bloomberg Economics, says the waterway may not be open as Trump envisions. There are still unanswered questions about what exactly a reopening of the strait will look like, whether it will be safe to cross after months of false starts, and if the waterway will be restored as a toll-free zone. She reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Asks Europe to Plug NATO’s Military Gaps as It Withdraws
title_cn: 美国要求欧洲在北约撤军时填补其军事空白
summary: The US is asking Europe to designate more of its military hardware for a NATO crisis, pressing the continent to fill gaps as Washington withdraws assets from the alliance.

summary: If there is one thing Ukraine’s European allies need out of the US at the Group of Seven summit, it’s to get Volodymyr Zelenskyy time with Donald Trump and nudge the US president to pay more attention to Russia’s war on Ukraine.

summary: Wes Streeting, the Labour lawmaker who’s said he may seek to topple UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer this summer, set out a leadership pitch centered on economic growth and defended bond investors in an effort to differentiate himself from front-runner Andy Burnham.
